span.p:
host_wallets.balanceKobo
cached snapshot, kept in sync
in the same DB transaction

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Every entry: balanceBeforeKobo/balanceAfterKobo snapshot
+ currentHash = hash(immutable columns + prevHash)
First entry per host chains to sentinel GENESIS.
appendEntry() takes a row-level lock (SELECT ... FOR UPDATE
on host_wallets) as the serialization point — a debit that
would go negative throws.
